Likelihood Definition: Minimal chance of occurrence; highly unlikely.
Severity Definition: Minor injury (e.g. small cut or bruise); no time off required; negligible damage.

Likelihood Definition: Low probability but not negligible; may happen sporadically or under specific circumstances.
Severity Definition: First aid required; limited and easily manageable impact; minor damage.

Likelihood Definition: Moderate chance of occurrence; neither uncommon nor frequent.
Severity Definition: Noticeable injury or illness requiring medical treatment; lost time; significant damage.

Likelihood Definition: Significant probability; a good chance it will happen.
Severity Definition: Significant injury or long-term disability; major damage; serious breach of safety standards.

Likelihood Definition: Highly likely to happen; practically a certainty.
Severity Definition: Fatal or catastrophic harm; multi-person impact; total loss of facility or process.
